title: Beadlea miradorensis
taxonomy: Beadlea miradorensis is a member of the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the order Asterales, which is a group of flowering plants. Within the family Asteraceae, Beadlea miradorensis is classified as a genus in the subfamily Stifftioideae. The subfamily Stifftioideae is further divided into various tribes, with Beadlea miradorensis being a part of one of them. This plant's classification is still being studied and refined by botanists.
